name: 企业微信套件
examples_zh: 给张三发条消息，告诉他下午3点有个会
帮我新建一个企业微信文档，把本周会议纪要整理进去
下周一上午10点约产品组开个需求评审会，提前半小时提醒我
examples_en: Send a message to Zhangsan reminding him of the 3 PM meeting
Create a new WeCom doc and put this week's meeting notes into it
Schedule a product review meeting at 10 AM next Monday, remind me 30 min ahead
